An LLM (Large Language Model) is a type of artificial intelligence model developed to process and generate text, such as language, speech, or other forms of information. These models are trained on vast amounts of data to understand and respond to human questions accurately.

LLMs can be used for various tasks, including answering questions, providing information, generating creative content, and even assisting with writing. They work by analyzing a large dataset to learn patterns and create responses that are both accurate and helpful.
